episode_theme: Eleanor enters Blackwood Estate under Mrs. Cross' scrutiny

scenes.scene_purpose: Establish oppressive threshold and Eleanor's forced commitment.

beats.description: Carriage arrival at the rusted gates in relentless rain.
beats.goal: Eleanor must gain entry to the estate.
beats.conflict: The Groundsman warns her and delays opening the gate.
beats.turn: He finally unlatches the iron gates.
beats.visual: Rust-choked wrought-iron gates towering over the carriage while rain sheets across the lens.
beats.character_action: Eleanor steels herself inside the carriage while the Groundsman wrestles the lock.
beats.revelation: The gates barely function and the house already resists.

shots.nano_prompt: Low-angle wide of the governess's carriage dwarfed by the chained gates while rain lashes the iron.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Camera drifts backward as thunder rolls and the gates shudder only after repeated impacts, telegraphing the estate's resistance.
shots.lighting: Lantern rim light battling muted moon glow
shots.character_blocking: Groundsman at gate, carriage in foreground, towering gates overhead
shots.description: CAM: low-angle wide (24mm steadicam float) on chained gates dwarfing the carriage. REF: environment only—gates, carriage roof, rain. LIGHT: lantern rim battling moonlit downpour. BLOCK: Groundsman bracing lock as carriage idles under looming iron.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from scene BW_EP1_001 cold open and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_001_002A.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 24mm steadicam float backward at action start, honoring Groundsman at gate grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Groundsman at gate, carriage in foreground, towering gates overhead locked before cutting.

shots.nano_prompt: Macro on gloved hands forcing the corroded padlock, water exploding off the knuckles as rust flakes away.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Static macro holds while the lock screams and finally snaps, foley peaking to sell the barrier break.
shots.lighting: Single lantern gleam catching wet iron
shots.description: CAM: macro insert (65mm locked) on padlock and gloves. REF: environment detail. LIGHT: single lantern gleam over soaked iron. BLOCK: gloved hands twisting center frame while rust flakes away.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from BW_EP1_001_001A and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_001_003B.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 65mm macro locked off at action start, honoring Hands centered grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Hands centered, lock filling frame locked before cutting.

shots.nano_prompt: Locked governess reference seen through rain-streaked glass, oil-lamp light carving her profile while breath fogs the pane.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Slow push toward the window as she states her formal request, condensation marking every restrained syllable.

dialogue.line: Might I enquire as to the location of the housekeeper?

shots.dialogue_subtext: She keeps perfect diction to hide that she is terrified of the warning.
shots.lighting: 2500K oil lamp practical with moon occlusion
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor framed by window, Groundsman silhouette outside
shots.description: CAM: 85mm push-in through carriage window at governess reference. REF: Eleanor Vance portrait. LIGHT: oil lamp key with occluded moon backfill. BLOCK: Eleanor centered, Groundsman silhouette occluding exterior.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from BW_EP1_001_002A and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_001_004B.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 85mm subtle push-in from carriage interior at action start, honoring Eleanor framed by window grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Eleanor framed by window, Groundsman silhouette outside locked before cutting.

shots.nano_prompt: Medium profile of the carriage rolling beneath the arch while the governess silhouette drifts past the motionless driver.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Dolly follow tracks the carriage crossing the threshold as the warning is spoken and the lamp light dies once she clears the gate.
shots.dialogue_subtext: It is both a warning and a ritual reminder that she cannot turn back.
shots.character_blocking: Carriage passes under gate, Groundsman holds position
shots.description: CAM: 35mm dolly follow alongside carriage. REF: Governess + Groundsman references. LIGHT: lantern falloff into arch shadow. BLOCK: carriage rolling under gate while Groundsman stays statue-still in rain.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from BW_EP1_001_003B and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_001_005C.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 35mm dolly follow alongside carriage at action start, honoring Carriage passes under gate grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Carriage passes under gate, Groundsman holds position locked before cutting.

shots.nano_prompt: Overhead view of the governess's lap with the estate map, lantern glow pooling over penciled annotations.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Top-down drift lingers as she whispers to the carriage and folds the map with deliberate composure.

dialogue.line: Carriage, do not fail me now.

shots.dialogue_subtext: She bargains with fate because no one else is listening.
shots.lighting: Lantern pools of light over parchment
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor centered, map and gloved hands anchoring frame
shots.description: CAM: overhead insert (top-down 50mm) on governess lap with estate map. REF: Eleanor Vance. LIGHT: lantern pools over penciled annotations. BLOCK: gloved hands center frame, map folds closing shot.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from BW_EP1_001_004B and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_001_006D.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera Top-down 50mm crane drop at action start, honoring Eleanor centered grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Eleanor centered, map and gloved hands anchoring frame locked before cutting.

shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Tracking beside the wheel while iron bars swing shut behind, mud splash branding the carriage like possession.
shots.lens_specs: shallow DOF on wheel and mud
shots.lighting: Lantern spill mixed with cold rain reflections

ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Wheel and gate shadow dominating frame locked before cutting.

scenes.scene_guide: SCENE GUIDE: Exterior front gates at night; low-angle framing anchored to the iron arch with carriage foreground, rain sheeting through lantern rim light.

scenes.scene_purpose: Show Eleanor isolated inside and introduce the hostile interior mood.

beats.description: Eleanor steps into the oppressive foyer and realizes she is utterly alone.
beats.goal: Compose herself and proceed as instructed.
beats.conflict: The house feels hostile and deserted.
beats.turn: A music box melody floats from upstairs.
beats.visual: Cobwebbed chandelier above an empty foyer swallowing Eleanor in shafts of greenish gaslight.
beats.character_action: Eleanor removes her gloves, flinches at the slamming door, and studies the hostile foyer.
beats.revelation: She may not be alone after all.

shots.nano_prompt: Medium shot of the governess removing rain-damp gloves before the massive oak door.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Static hold as the door booms shut and she flinches, forcing herself upright inside the sealed foyer.
shots.lighting: Dim gaslamp edge with door silhouette
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor foreground, closing door dominating background
shots.description: CAM: locked 50mm medium on governess removing rain-damp gloves. REF: Eleanor Vance. LIGHT: dim gaslamp rim/backfill. BLOCK: Eleanor foreground rigid, oak door dominating rear plane.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from scene BW_EP1_002 cold open and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_002_002A.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 50mm locked medium at action start, honoring Eleanor foreground grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Eleanor foreground, closing door dominating background locked before cutting.

shots.nano_prompt: Pedestal-wide of the governess standing dwarfed by the staircase and cobwebbed chandelier.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Pedestal rise lifts past her tiny figure to reveal the chandelier choked in dust as the house breathes over her.
shots.lighting: Sickly green-yellow gaslamp with cobweb diffusion
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor small at base while staircase towers
shots.description: CAM: pedestal-up wide (24mm) swallowing governess beneath staircase and chandelier. REF: Eleanor Vance. LIGHT: sickly green-yellow gaslamp vs moonlight shafts. BLOCK: Eleanor tiny at base; pedestal reveals cobwebbed chandelier and vanishing stairs.

ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Eleanor small at base while staircase towers locked before cutting.

shots.nano_prompt: Extreme close of the governess's ear and temple catching the faint vibration of a music box.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Subtle tilt traces behind her head while the melody drifts from above, her eye twitch betraying the warning.
shots.lens_specs: extreme shallow DOF on ear and eye
shots.lighting: Almost no key, highlight tracing profile
shots.description: CAM: extreme CU tilt (100mm) behind governess ear catching music-box vibration. REF: Eleanor Vance. LIGHT: faint rim along profile, rest in darkness. BLOCK: ear/temple fill frame while background dissolves.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from BW_EP1_002_002A and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_002_004C.

shots.nano_prompt: Three-quarter wide of the governess framed by gaslamp halo at the staircase base as she calls into the void.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Slow arc around her as she commands "Show yourself—per instructions!" and the music cuts off mid-phrase.
shots.dialogue_subtext: She invokes protocol as armor even though she is alone.
shots.lighting: Gaslamps tracing the railing, moonlight seep from transom
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor anchored right third, staircase dominating rest
shots.description: CAM: 35mm arc wide at stair base. REF: Eleanor Vance. LIGHT: gaslamp halo vs black stair void. BLOCK: Eleanor framed one-third, staircase towering toward camera as she calls upward.

scenes.scene_guide: SCENE GUIDE: Grand foyer interior; pedestal axis centered on the dual staircase and chandelier, governess framed as a small figure within the gaslamp halo.

scenes.scene_purpose: Introduce Mrs. Cross as antagonist and force Eleanor to assert control.

beats.description: Mrs. Cross materializes silently, forcing Eleanor to confront the house rules.
beats.goal: Eleanor needs cooperation from the staff.
beats.conflict: Mrs. Cross exerts authority and hostility.
beats.turn: Eleanor realizes she must assert herself.
beats.visual: Chiaroscuro hallway where Mrs. Cross emerges from black void as Eleanor spins in shock.
beats.character_action: Eleanor pivots to confront Mrs. Cross and refuses to yield ground.
beats.revelation: Mrs. Cross is both gatekeeper and antagonist.

shots.nano_prompt: Medium shot as the governess spins to face the housekeeper emerging silently from a side hall, both carved by a slash of light.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Snap zoom retract reveals the reprimand "You were not invited to wander" freezing the governess mid-step.

dialogue.line: You were not invited to wander.

shots.dialogue_subtext: She asserts total control over the space without raising her voice.
shots.lighting: Hard chiaroscuro slash across Mrs. Cross
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor foreground, Mrs. Cross emerging from hallway
shots.description: CAM: 35mm medium as housekeeper emerges from side hall, governess spinning foreground. REF: Eleanor Vance, Mrs. Cross. LIGHT: hard chiaroscuro slash isolating both faces. BLOCK: Eleanor foreground profile, Mrs. Cross materializing from void.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from scene BW_EP1_003 cold open and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_003_002B.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 35mm snap zoom retract at action start, honoring Eleanor foreground grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Eleanor foreground, Mrs. Cross emerging from hallway locked before cutting.

shots.nano_prompt: Close-up on the governess regaining composure, eyes locked while the housekeeper blurs in the background.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Static duel as she replies "Then provide me a lamp and I will keep to my work" using impeccable diction to reclaim control.

dialogue.line: Then provide me a lamp and I will keep to my work.

shots.dialogue_subtext: She counters authority with politeness weaponized as control.
shots.lighting: Sharp key only on Eleanor, darkness behind Mrs. Cross
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor in focus, Mrs. Cross blurred behind
shots.description: CAM: locked 65mm close-up on governess reclaiming composure while housekeeper blurs behind. REF: Eleanor Vance. LIGHT: sharp key on Eleanor, darkness enveloping background. BLOCK: Eleanor center frame, Mrs. Cross defocused over shoulder.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from BW_EP1_003_001A and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_003_003C.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 65mm locked duel close-up at action start, honoring Eleanor in focus grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Eleanor in focus, Mrs. Cross blurred behind locked before cutting.

dialogue.line: Mr. Blackwood's rules are not open to negotiation.

shots.dialogue_subtext: She weaponizes the master's name to keep Eleanor submissive.
